justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates dependencies to Jakarta EE 10 compatible versions, but introduces a Spring Boot dependency (spring-boot-starter-web) that is unrelated to the Jakarta migration and creates potential conflicts with the existing JAX-RS/Jersey setup. The compiler plugin is correctly updated to use <release>21, but the diff lacks Java 21 idioms (records, pattern matching, etc.) and contains some unnecessary churn like adding shared-cache-mode to persistence.xml.
